entry.title: Giskard
entry.description: AI testing platform for evaluating, scanning, and monitoring machine learning and LLM application quality.
entry.seoDescription: Giskard supports AI testing, evaluation, scanning, and monitoring for ML and LLM application quality.
entry.author: Giskard
entry.cardDescription: AI testing platform for LLM and ML quality.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Giskard fits teams that want testing and monitoring workflows for LLM and machine learning system quality.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
